evidence.observation: The image displays a single piece of clothing designed to cover the entire torso and extend down to a midi length, characteristic of a dress.
The garment is uniformly colored in a deep, desaturated green hue, clearly identifiable as olive green.
The dress features a V-neckline created by overlapping panels, short sleeves with subtle gathering, an elasticated and cinched waist, and a wrap-style skirt that extends to the mid-calf.
The neckline forms a distinct 'V' shape due to the construction of the wrap-front bodice.
The sleeves are short, ending above the elbow, and appear to be slightly gathered or ruched at the shoulder seam.
A self-fabric tie belt is visible at the waist, securing the overlapping front panels of the dress, indicative of a wrap closure.
The fabric of the garment is a solid color with no discernible patterns, graphics, or prints.
No brand markings, logos, or emblems are visible anywhere on the garment.
The waistline shows clear gathering and cinching, suggesting an elasticated construction for fit.
The fabric exhibits a smooth, slightly crinkled texture and falls softly, indicating a fluid drape.
There are no visible pockets stitched onto or integrated into the garment's design.
No buttons are present on the front closure, cuffs, or any other visible part of the dress.

analysis.silhouette_summary: A relaxed fit, long-sleeved blouse with a V-neckline and elasticated cuffs, featuring a curved hem.

visual_details.description: V-neck with a narrow standing band collar
Long, gathered sleeves with elasticated cuffs
V-neck placket, no visible buttons (pull-on style)
Dense all-over floral pattern with pink, peach, and red flowers and green leaves on a navy blue background
Gathering seams at shoulder to create sleeve volume
Curved hemline

evidence.observation: The item is a women's top with long sleeves, a V-neck, and a flowy silhouette, indicative of a blouse.
The main background color of the fabric is a dark blue, specifically navy.
The blouse has a loose, flowing body, full-length sleeves, a V-shaped neckline, and a rounded, shirttail-like hem.
The neckline forms a clear V-shape, extending into a narrow stand-up collar at the back neck.
The sleeves are long and have gathered fullness at the shoulder seam. The cuffs are elasticated, creating a slight puff effect at the wrist.
A narrow placket is visible along the V-neck opening, but no buttons or zippers are apparent, suggesting a pull-on style.
The garment features a dense all-over floral print with large and small flowers in various shades of pink, peach, and red, interspersed with green leaves, on a navy background.
Gathering stitches are visible where the sleeves attach to the shoulder, creating volume.
The bottom edge of the blouse is distinctly curved, rising higher at the sides than at the front and back center.

limitations: Only a front-facing, flat lay view of the garment is available, limiting assessment of drape on a body and back details.
unknowns: specific type of elastic in cuffs
